title: The Tea Party Falls Apart
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Caesar Clown as The tea party collapses into chaos as the alliance tries to flee Big Mom’s territory.
scene: The assassination plan fails and the wedding becomes a desperate escape from a collapsing battlefield.

dialogue.text: to the ghosts that have not even land to step foot on

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 27 dialogue beats. The alliance survives the failed tea party by turning the chaos into a retreat.
